test.query: SELECT CounterID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY CounterID ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT CounterID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY CounterID ASC LIMIT 100 FORMAT Null
SELECT CounterID, EventDate, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID, EventDate ORDER BY CounterID, EventDate LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT CounterID, EventDate, RegionID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID, EventDate, RegionID ORDER BY CounterID, EventDate LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
